summary: OMS Phase 2 Financial Linkage Testing Complete - 20/20 backend tests passed (100%), 16/16 frontend checks passed. All Phase 2 features working: ledger posting on confirm, reversal on cancel, settlement linkage, financial summary with 5 metrics, ledger entries table with balanced totals.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/orders creates order with financial_status=not_posted, ledger_posting_refs=[], settlement_run_refs=[]
✅ POST /api/orders/{id}/confirm triggers ledger posting (3 entries: debit agency, credit supplier, credit platform revenue)
✅ Ledger entries are balanced: total_debit = total_credit = sell_total
✅ GET /api/orders/{id}/financial-summary returns enhanced summary with all required fields
✅ GET /api/orders/{id}/ledger-entries returns entries with balanced totals
✅ GET /api/orders/{id}/ledger-postings returns posting documents
✅ POST /api/orders/{id}/financial-summary/rebuild rebuilds summary correctly
✅ GET /api/orders/{id}/settlements returns runs and status
✅ POST /api/orders/{id}/settlements/link links settlement run, changes status to partially_settled
✅ POST /api/orders/{id}/mark-settled marks order as fully settled (requires confirm first)
✅ POST /api/orders/{id}/cancel after confirm creates reversal entries, financial_status=reversed
✅ POST /api/orders/{id}/post-to-ledger manual posting endpoint works
✅ Timeline includes financial events (order_ledger_linked, order_financial_summary_built, order_settlement_linked)
✅ Version field increments on status transitions
✅ Order number format still ORD-YYYY-NNNNNN
✅ Search endpoint still works
✅ Frontend: Order detail page shows Financial Summary Card with 5 metrics
✅ Frontend: Ledger Kayıtları card shows debit/credit entries table with totals
✅ Frontend: Ödeme/Settlement card shows settlement status, run count, run ID, last date
✅ Frontend: Order header shows 3 status badges (order, financial, settlement)
✅ Frontend: Rebuild summary button works and calls API
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_* prefixed orders for testing ledger posting, reversal, settlement linkage, etc. 86 total orders exist in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: OMS Phase 2 Financial Linkage fully tested. Key features: (1) Orders auto-post to ledger on confirm with 3 entries (agency receivable debit, supplier payable credit, platform revenue credit). (2) Cancellation creates reversal entries. (3) Settlement runs can be linked to orders. (4) Financial summary has 5 metrics: sell_total, supplier_total, margin_total, financial_status, settlement_status. (5) Ledger entries show balanced debit/credit. (6) Timeline shows financial events. (7) Order detail has 3 cards: Financial Summary, Ledger Entries, Settlement. Existing confirmed order ord_301c98478a77 has ledger entries.

ledger_posting_on_confirm.description: Order confirmation triggers double-entry ledger posting

ledger_reversal_on_cancel.description: Cancelling confirmed order creates reversal entries
